source_claim: Every QA tuple (b,e) with b=e in S_9={1,...,9} satisfies d=2b, and d mod 9 equals (2b-1) mod 9 + 1 under A1 no-zero reduction.
qa_translation: For all b in {1,...,9} with e=b: d := b+e = 2b (derived by A2). Under A1 mod-9 reduction r(x) = ((x-1) mod 9) + 1, r(d) = r(2b). Exhaustive check across 9 diagonal points.
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-15; mapping of Ju et al. (2026) arXiv:2604.03789 into QA cert format; see docs/theory/QA_AUTOMATED_CONJECTURE_RESOLUTION.md
